song.title: Before The Throne
song.author: Charitie L. Bancroft
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C F C 1) Before the throne of God above .C Em I have a strong, a perfect plea, . F G Am A great High Priest, whose name is Love, . F G C Who ever lives and pleads for me.|| . F C My name is graven on His hands, . F Am My name is written on His heart. . F G Am I know that while in heaven He stands, . Am F G Am No tongue can bid me thence depart, No tongue can bid me thence depart. . Am F G C F C
[V2] . C F C 2) When Satan tempts me to despair .C Em And tells me of the guilt within, . F G Am Upward I look, and see Him there . F G C Who made an end of all my sin.|| . F C Because the sinless Savior died, . F Am My sinful soul is counted free; . F G Am For God, the Just, is satisfied . Am F G Am To look on Him and pardon me, To look on Him and pardon me. . Am F G C F C
[V3] . C F C 3) Behold Him there, the risen Lamb! .C Em My perfect, spotless righteousness, . F G Am The great unchangeable I AM, . F G C The King of glory and of grace!|| . F C One in Himself, I cannot die, . F Am My soul is purchased by His blood . F G Am My life is hid with Christ on high, . Am F G Am With Christ, my Savior and my God, WIth Christ, my Savior and my God. . Am F G C F C
